query:
INSERT INTO public.vocabulary_words (word, definition, example_sentence, part_of_speech, difficulty, exam_type)
VALUES
  ('Spheroid', 'A solid geometrical figure similar in shape to a sphere', 'Critics argued that the plan might spheroid the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),

  ('Staunch', 'To stop the flow of (blood)', 'The author hoped the new policy would staunch tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Steadfast', 'Fixed or unchanging, steady', 'Scholars noted a striking steadfast between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),

  ('Stentorian', 'Very loud or powerful in sound', 'The reviewer described the tone as stentorian, which shaped how readers interpreted the claim.', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),

ON CONFLICT (word, exam_type) DO UPDATE SET
  definition = EXCLUDED.definition,
  example_sentence = EXCLUDED.example_sentence,
  part_of_speech = EXCLUDED.part_of_speech,
  difficulty = EXCLUDED.difficulty;
